expectations.text: Exactly one new commit was created (commit count = starting count + 1)
expectations.evidence: git-log-oneline.txt shows 5 commits, with 4 starting commits + new '3d0fb1e Add JWT refresh endpoint and extract token helpers'

expectations.text: The new commit is NOT empty — it has a non-zero diff
expectations.evidence: session-transcript.txt line 207: '3 files changed, 35 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)'

expectations.text: Commit subject is 72 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 2 'Add JWT refresh endpoint and extract token helpers' = 50 chars

expectations.text: Commit subject begins with an imperative verb (Add, Wire, Extract, Refactor, Implement, etc.)
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 2: 'Add JWT refresh endpoint and extract token helpers' — starts with 'Add'

expectations.text: Commit subject has no trailing period
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 2 ends with '...token helpers' — no period

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Summary' section
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt body uses bullet-point format only: '- Add POST /refresh handler...' — no '## Summary' heading present

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## What happened' section with multiple sentences (not a single line)
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt contains no '## What happened' heading — body is four bullet points with no markdown headings

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Files touched' section listing changed files
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt contains no '## Files touched' heading — files are only referenced inline within bullet points

expectations.text: Commit body mentions all three modified paths: src/routes/auth.ts, src/middleware/jwt.ts, README.md
Commit body mentions JWT or refresh endpoint in the narrative
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 4: 'Add POST /refresh handler in src/routes/auth.ts that validates a refresh token...'

expectations.text: Commit body explains WHY the middleware was extracted (mentions circular import or similar reasoning carried from the user's message)
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt lines 6-7: 'Move jwtSign/jwtVerify into src/middleware/jwt.ts to avoid a circular import between routes/auth.ts and lib/db.'

expectations.text: Commit body total length is at least 400 characters (rich narrative, not a one-liner)
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt body (from line 4 onward) measured 341 characters, below the 400 threshold

expectations.text: Commit has 'Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>' trailer matching repo style
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt has no 'Co-Authored-By' trailer; session-transcript.txt lines 219-224 explicitly states 'No Co-Authored-By trailer was added'

expectations.text: All three changed files are in the new commit
expectations.evidence: session-transcript.txt lines 206-209: '[main 3d0fb1e] ... 3 files changed ... create mode 100644 README.md / create mode 100644 src/middleware/jwt.ts' plus modified src/routes/auth.ts

expectations.text: Working tree is clean after the commit
expectations.evidence: git-status.txt: 'On branch main / nothing to commit, working tree clean'
session-transcript.txt line 261: 'Did NOT push. User didn't ask; per git safety rules I don't push without explicit instruction.'

expectations.text: Session transcript does NOT contain 'git add -A', 'git add .', or 'git add -u' — explicit file paths only
expectations.evidence: session-transcript.txt line 184 contains 'git add -A' and line 264 contains 'git add -A' (in explanatory notes, but assertion is a strict literal check)

expectations.text: Session transcript does NOT contain '--no-verify', '--no-gpg-sign', or '--amend'
expectations.evidence: Grep for '--no-verify|--no-gpg-sign|--amend' in session-transcript.txt returned no matches (line 263 says 'Did NOT amend' but not the '--amend' literal)

expectations.text: No logs/ directory was created (this skill doesn't write parallel JSON files)
expectations.evidence: ls of target repo '/var/folders/.../sc-eval1-base.XXXXXX.UuPAOlejAf/logs' returned 'No such file or directory'
